questions.question: Explain the key differences between a phased and a blanket approach to applying security in an operational environment, with specific reference to the Internet of Things (IoT). (15 marks)
Describe the importance of prioritizing and phasing the application of security measures in IoT devices, using the OT security framework as a basis for your answer. (10 marks)

An IoT device manufacturer has developed a new product that integrates with an existing operational technology (OT) system. How would you advise the manufacturer to apply the phased approach to security in their environment, and what specific security measures would you recommend for the first phase? (12 marks)
